coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 5-group, 168-node closure.
validation: The Geometry Nodes output, including all non-manifold edge tubes and tetrahedral diagnostic markers, has exact topology and bounds. The supplied object applies a separate Bevel modifier after Geometry Nodes; that non-GN modifier is excluded from the fair VM comparison and documented with its full-stack evaluated counts.

materialParity.validation: The browser recognizes the authored two-node Background to Material Output contract generically, routes the exact 53,760-index flat.w group through MeshBasicMaterial, and rejects linked Background inputs instead of claiming unsupported procedural parity. The filament front and back color branches reproduce Blender, Generated coordinates use the exact filament material-group bounds, and a clean-room lookup3/Perlin fBm reconstruction drives Blender-style forward-derivative bump normals. Against the GN-only authored Eevee reference, silhouette IoU is 0.9979, macro luminance MAE is 0.0470, macro correlation is 0.939, and mean luminance delta is +0.0083. The high-frequency layer lines remain phase/filter sensitive: pixel MAE is 0.0741, so procedural raster parity is improved but not exact.
